closed_world.quote: Right away you find yourself in a big mansion. "I hope you find your stay here injoyable!" you hear a ghostly voice say.

investigator.quote: So you get up and wonder wich way to go, right or left?

red_herring.value: The initial supernatural curse narrative misdirects from the choose-your-own-adventure structure
red_herring.quote: Certainly you want to close this book, for it can only bring you bad luck. How can you possibly stand this no good

clue_fairness.value: Reader receives same information as protagonist through direct second-person address and explicit choice points
clue_fairness.quote: So you get up and wonder wich way to go, right or left? If you picked right, you run out of the house screaming

reveal_mechanic.value: Solution demonstrated through reader's cumulative choice-making success rather than deductive revelation
reveal_mechanic.quote: IF you got all the questions right you are an intelligent person with high expectations.

media_and_audience.value: Self-aware narrative acknowledging its own fictional construction and audience participation
media_and_audience.quote: This book will not selfdestruct in 5 seconds so please share it to more people.

_meta.title: ebook amy lockhart shhh the name of this book is classified
